---
name: Feature Request 🚀
about: Suggest an idea or proposal for a new frontend feature.
title: 'feat: [Short title of the feature]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Proposal
A clear and concise description of what the feature is and why it's needed.

## 👤 User Story
*As a* [User type], *I want to* [perform action] *so that* [achieve benefit].

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or UI component behavior you would like to see implemented.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered, if any.

## 🎨 Visual Mockup (Optional)
If you have mockups or designs (Figma, screenshots), please attach them here.

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context, drawings, or documentation links here.
